feat.name: Moray Ambush
feat.text: Like the moray eels athamaru communities raise and train, you know how to quickly strike from hiding. Stride or Swim directly toward the triggering creature and make a melee Strike against it. The target creature is off-guard to this attack.
feat.trigger: You are hidden and a creature who hasn’t detected you passes within 20 feet of you.
feat.special: If you’re mounted on an eel, you can have the eel move instead of yourself.
